title: Relics: Arcane Abilities
description: Adds new items and a dungeon for more adventure.
body:
**ArcaneAbilities** is a mod that introduces new dungeons, **relics** for the Relics mod, and a **player enhancement system**. The Relics mod itself brings a variety of unique and impressive artifacts, each with its own features and lore. With ArcaneAbilities, you can explore dungeons and further enhance your adventures in the game.

This mod adds the Skills Grimoire for improving player skills, as well as several dungeons and three new artifacts for them: Fate Beacon - one of the three artifacts; it allows you to find structures and also create search marks through which you can teleport. Shadow Lantern - the second artifact that enables the use of the power of darkness, converting it into abilities such as blinding, invisibility, or instant time manipulation. Stellar Sphere - the final artifact that allows the player to harness the abilities of the stars. This artifact grants temporary flight or the ability to annihilate enemies with a shower of stars. All these artifacts appear in a unique dungeon with numerous rooms and challenges that will require the player to exert effort to obtain these artifacts.

### Join the ArcaneAbilities Minecraft mod community:
- Discrod: [LINK](https://discord.gg/zu3vtManXG) (EN-RU)

Q: Can I use your mod in the modpack?
- A: Yea, use it if you want.

Q: Can I repost your mod to other site?
- A: Nope, you can’t.

This mod requires Relics and Hammer Lib!
